'''Tibor''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who assisted [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] during his trip to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He later accompanied Zorba to [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to help capture [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. He also supplied Zorba with information about various subjects and the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Jedi Prince]], which he interrogated using a variety of [[Spice/Legends|spices]]. Tibor used a portable anti-orbital [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] to get into Jabba's palace and search for the will of Jabba the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].
